# RFC 9700 endpoint inventory (generated)
#
# Generated by scripts/rfc9700-scan.sh from EVERY .route() mounted under
# crates/ironauth-oidc/src (the protocol router, the discovery router, and the
# issuer/JWKS router); do not edit by hand. Every path here MUST be mapped to a
# covering test (or an explicit not-applicable reason) in
# docs/conformance/rfc9700-checklist.md, so a new OAuth endpoint cannot ship
# uncovered while the checklist reads complete.
/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server/t/{tenant_id}/e/{environment_id}
/.well-known/openid-configuration/t/{tenant_id}/e/{environment_id}
/authorize
/connect/check_session
/consent
/device_authorization
/end_session
/introspect
/login
/par
/recover
/register
/revoke
